name: PCA9685
description: The PCA9685 output component exposes a PCA9685 PWM channel of a global [PCA9685 hub](https://esphome.io/components/output/pca9685#pca9685-component) as a float output.

config_entries.label: ID
config_entries.description: The id to use for this output component.

config_entries.label: Channel
config_entries.description: Choose the channel of the PCA9685 of this output component. Must be in range from 0 to 15.

config_entries.label: Pca9685 ID
config_entries.description: Manually specify the ID of the [PCA9685 hub](https://esphome.io/components/output/pca9685#pca9685-component). Use this if you have multiple PCA9685s you want to use at the same time.
